name: deepcore_rate
description: The Better Rate (q.side_rate slot 50, Deepcore SQ3 - the MANDATED trader-recognition-at-2-fields beat): Corliss at the mine commissary runs the shared dialog:wheat_trader tree, tier-gated by the wheat_trader/tick poller off the SHARED fields_liberated counter (0-1 pitch / 2-3 suspicious / 4+ hostile). Beat 1 plays the default pitch at fields=0 and sets heard_wheat_pitch via the walk-away button; beat 2 sets fields_liberated=2 by rcon (liberating real farms is the wheat-war scenarios' job), waits for the tick poller to latch wheat_trader_suspicious, and asserts the SUSPICIOUS entry preempts (say any-of all 3 lines + the 'Browse wares' label that replaces 'See the wares'). Negative bounds both ways: suspicious must NOT fire at fields=0, hostile must NOT fire at fields=2 (the ON_DISTANCE_VERY_CLOSE forced battle is hostile-only - the Kalahar payoff, deliberately out of scope here, so no battle prep). The register stage gate (heard_wheat_pitch + not hostile + not defeated_deepcore_wheat_trader) is asserted as one selector. Tier tags are one-way in canon - rcon removal is test surgery; cleanup restores fields=0 and strips everything injected.
_probe_note: Corliss's compiled latch rides the y=129 plaza height but the live-swept makuhita ambient 26b away sits at y=123 (1177.5,123,3234.5) - the commissary terrace may sit lower; ground-probe before the first live run.

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog, then reset the tier state. The suspicious/hostile tags are additive one-way in canon (the poller never clears them) - removing them here is deliberate test surgery for idempotent re-runs --

steps.comment_: one poller pass at fields=0: with the score at 0 nothing re-adds, so the removals stand

steps.comment: -- tp to the commissary (latch spawns within 40b; body persists - no kill needed), daylight, stale-battle sweep (a leftover battle would eat the interact), and shop-adjacent funding --

steps.comment_: the beat touches the trade shop lane; fund generously even though nothing is bought headless

steps.comment: -- beat 1: the default pitch at fields=0. say[] rotates 3 lines, so assert the stable default-tier trade label; the walk-away button sets heard_wheat_pitch --

steps.comment_: lower bound: recognition must NOT fire before 2 fields

steps.comment: -- beat 2: two fields fall (rcon - the real liberations live in the wheat-war scenarios), the tick poller latches recognition, and the SUSPICIOUS entry (prio 20) must preempt the pitch --

steps.comment_: the poller runs every tick; the settle covers the tag landing plus Easy NPC picking it up
the exact q.side_rate stage gate - the sidebar line is live in this state

expect_screen_text: You again. Hands where I can see the ledger. I will still take your trade — coin is coin, for now.
Something about you sits wrong, like a number that will not add. Buy what you came for and keep walking.
I have heard the talk. A face from the old company, walking the routes. Probably nothing. Probably. Wares are open.

steps.comment_: the suspicious-tier trade label - 'See the wares' is the default tier's; the swap IS the tier assert

steps.comment: -- upper bound: at 2 fields the trader is wary but NOT hostile - no hostile tag, so the ON_DISTANCE_VERY_CLOSE forced battle can never have fired (that payoff belongs to Kalahar at 4+ fields) --
-- cleanup: restore the fresh-player state this scenario injected (wheat_war_first_farm assumes fields_liberated 0 and re-earns heard_wheat_pitch itself) --
